# Solving linear equations

## Short Teaching Summary
Solving linear equations: Solving the equation 75t = 14 - 65t yields a solution of t = 0.1 hours, meaning both cars are 7.5 miles away at that time. Map connection: this idea links by requires to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.

0.00
